---
title: "Real-World Data Applications"
description: "Empirical game theory with public historical data — trade, conflict, climate, health."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
80 TUTORIALS
:::

# Real-World Data Applications

Empirical game theory with public historical data — trade, conflict, climate, health.
